rationale: The two papers are tightly aligned in construct and setting: both study shared/joint consumption and how uncertainty/clarity about a partner’s interests affects focus/enjoyment and decision outcomes (citing note: “no-preference communication” and perceived undisclosed preferences; cited note: “clarity about a partner’s interests” and enjoyment via distraction/focus). Given this conceptual overlap and the exact DOI match, the cited work is plausibly a substantive prior/theory source rather than an incidental mention.
